tasks.title: Confirm the build approach
tasks.expectedOutput: Implementation plan with boundaries, risks, tests, and handoff notes
tasks.resultSummary: Architecture response recorded. Canonical package and approved Blueprint control implementation scope.

tasks.title: Implement the approved package
tasks.requiredInput: Founder-approved Natural Nation Day 1 member-facing foundation under app/frontend. FOUNDER CORRECTION REQUEST: Send the five verified corrections back to Codex before Founder approval.
tasks.expectedOutput: A real GitHub pull request with implementation and validation evidence.
tasks.resultSummary: Implementation created through the protected repository-execution adapter. GitHub pull request: https://github.com/Natural-Nation-MVP/natural-nation-mvp/pull/41. Changed files: app/frontend/CORRECTIONS_IDENTIFIED.md. Validation evidence is recorded in PR #41 and its CI checks.

retryContext.reason: Send the five verified corrections back to Codex before Founder approval.
retryContext.requiredCorrection: Implement the requested corrections on the existing implementation pull request or a successor pull request with fresh validation evidence.

tasks.title: Review the experience
tasks.requiredInput: Review only GitHub PR #38 and these exact changed files: app/frontend/index.html, app/frontend/package.json, app/frontend/src/App.js, app/frontend/src/assets/styles.css, app/frontend/src/main.js. Evaluate the actual corrected Natural Nation Day 1 implementation using only the pull-request patches injected by Founder OS. Cite evidence only by the assigned FILE-### IDs and echo each supplied fingerprint exactly. Do not return repository paths in evidence, do not invent files, and do not claim facts absent from the supplied evidence.
tasks.expectedOutput: A provider-native experience_review JSON object with exact camelCase fields: type, summary, passes, issues, mergeBlockers, recommendation, and evidence. Each evidence item must contain fileId, fingerprint, and finding.
tasks.resultSummary:
{"type":"experience_review","summary":"The initial member-facing frontend foundation for Natural Nation includes essential responsive design elements and clear foundational styling. Key usability elements such as a descriptive title, introductory text, and a call-to-action button are present. However, functional navigation is currently absent, and the basic responsive layout could be improved for smaller screens.","passes":["Responsive viewport meta tag is correctly implemented.","Images are styled to be responsive, preventing overflow.","Clear and welcoming introductory text is provided.","Placeholder image includes an appropriate alt attribute for accessibility.","Overall foundational styling is clean and provides a good visual baseline."],"issues":["Navigation links are currently non-functional placeholders, significantly impacting usability.","The basic flexbox navigation may not be optimally responsive on very small screens without further media queries.","The fixed footer, while providing visual consistency, could potentially obscure content on pages with limited vertical space."],"mergeBlockers":[],"recommendation":"changes_required","evidence":[{"fileId":"FILE-001","fingerprint":"2292ea3abb3f78e3c51992946a7636dea63ea0efab9d91b63e5072568ff89b5e","finding":"The '' tag is correctly included, ensuring basic responsive behavior."},{"fileId":"FILE-003","fingerprint":"80809bfb5f1d874d3b9ef9f1584eb179dc25bcf53ff7c5dbf581e78680a1b21d","finding":"The '

Welcome, Valued Member!

' and accompanying paragraph provide clear and welcoming introductory text."},{"fileId":"FILE-003","fingerprint":"80809bfb5f1d874d3b9ef9f1584eb179dc25bcf53ff7c5dbf581e78680a1b21d","finding":"The placeholder image includes a descriptive 'alt=\"Placeholder image for member portal\"' attribute, enhancing accessibility."},{"fileId":"FILE-004","fingerprint":"2602b6509b23aa6aa633323062fd7633138a2db250868f02fb9a72ec0edf4897","finding":"The 'img { max-width: 100%; height: auto; }' rule ensures images scale responsively within their containers."},{"fileId":"FILE-003","fingerprint":"80809bfb5f1d874d3b9ef9f1584eb179dc25bcf53ff7c5dbf581e78680a1b21d","finding":"Navigation links ('Home', 'Member Dashboard') currently use placeholder '#' hrefs, which do not provide functional navigation."},{"fileId":"FILE-004","fingerprint":"2602b6509b23aa6aa633323062fd7633138a2db250868f02fb9a72ec0edf4897","finding":"The horizontal navigation ('nav ul { display: flex; }') lacks specific optimizations for smaller screens, potentially impacting layout on mobile devices."},{"fileId":"FILE-004","fingerprint":"2602b6509b23aa6aa633323062fd7633138a2db250868f02fb9a72ec0edf4897","finding":"The fixed footer ('position: fixed; bottom: 0;') could potentially obscure content if page content is minimal or shorter than the viewport height."}]}

retryContext.reason: The provider schema used stale repository paths while the current PR used a different file layout.
retryContext.requiredCorrection: Use dynamically assigned evidence IDs and content fingerprints instead of repository paths in provider responses.

tasks.title: Prepare the Founder review
tasks.requiredInput: Use the verified PR #38 implementation evidence and the next grounded Gemini review. Return only the provider-native founder_review contract.
tasks.expectedOutput: A provider-native founder_review JSON object with exact fields: type, decision, comments, risks, and nextAction.

tasks.title: Approve or request changes
tasks.requiredInput: Verified build pull request, validation evidence, grounded experience review, and deterministic Founder summary
